summary: Iteration 4 testing completed. All backend tests passed (16/16). Frontend code verified. Book logo, mermaid expand button CSS fix, reading progress bar gradient, new categories and documents all confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: Mermaid expand button CSS fix verified: .mermaid-expand-btn svg { width: 12px !important; } prevents SVG from inheriting parent min-width
Mermaid diagram SVG scoped to direct child: .mermaid-diagram > div > svg { min-width: 500px; } - button SVG unaffected
Reading progress bar: 4px height with gradient (linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), #a78bfa)) and box-shadow for glow effect
Book logo SVG confirmed in login page and sidebar (path d='M4 19.5v-15...' is a book, not triangle)
New categories: Limitations & Constraints (order: 12), UI Guide (order: 13) - both present
New documents: Platform Limitations, Complete UI Guide - both exist
System Architecture doc contains: Database Layer, job_audits, Tool Registry, ENV sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 fixes verified via backend API tests and code review. Playwright auth had CORS issues with internal domain - login page tests passed (book icon verified). For future auth testing: the session token 'test_admin_session_token' exists in MongoDB with admin user 'chethan@emergent.sh'. CSS fixes confirmed in App.css: mermaid expand button SVG has 12px !important override, diagram SVG uses scoped selector > div > svg.

mermaid_expand_button_huge.details: CSS added: .mermaid-expand-btn svg { width: 12px !important; height: 12px !important; min-width: 12px !important; }
mermaid_expand_button_huge.root_cause: SVG inside button was inheriting .mermaid-diagram > div > svg min-width: 500px

book_logo.details: Both login page and sidebar use book SVG with path d='M4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2H20v20H6.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 1 0-5H20' plus text line paths

reading_progress_bar.details: CSS: height: 4px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), #a78bfa); box-shadow for glow

system_architecture_updated.details: Contains Database Layer, job_audits, Tool Registry, ENV sections
system_architecture_updated.verified_via: Backend API test - all 4 sections found in content

new_categories.details: Limitations & Constraints and UI Guide categories created

new_documents.details: Platform Limitations and Complete UI Guide documents exist

ai_chatbot_context.details: POST /api/chat returns detailed MongoDB/database info when asked about system architecture
ai_chatbot_context.verified_via: Backend API test - response mentions MongoDB, database, collections
